title: Non-alcoholic fermented beer having improved flavour
abstract: The invention provides a process of producing a non-alcoholic beer comprising the steps of:
claims: 1. A non-alcoholic fermented beer having an alcohol content of less than 1.0% ABV, and comprising methional, 2-methyl butanal, 3-methyl butanal, 2-methyl propanal, phenyl acetaldehyde and furfural and maltotriose in concentrations that meet the following conditions:
